## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [hypermode.com: $500k pipeline for next 90 days; clearer product-market fit after \~6 months](https://fathom.video/share/J3Wwf3ztAxtPwEXj_1zCzs69G9w53--8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [fwd.digital: Explosive growth to $4M ARR, 27 clients, 17 team members; bootstrapped](https://fathom.video/share/J3Wwf3ztAxtPwEXj_1zCzs69G9w53--8?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Both startups experiencing rapid progress and overcoming initial challenges](https://fathom.video/share/J3Wwf3ztAxtPwEXj_1zCzs69G9w53--8?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Topics

### hypermode.com Progress
